headline: Is It Time To Reassess S&P Global (SPGI) After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: For readers wondering whether S&P Global at around US$417 per share is offering value or asking too much of future expectations, this article breaks down what the current price might be implying. The stock is up 2.6% over the last week, but is still down 5.8% over the past month and down 18.7% year to date, with a 17.6% decline over the last year set against longer term 3-year and 5-year returns of 20.0% and 14.6% respectively. Recent coverage of S&P Global has focused on its role as a core...

headline: S&P Global Announces Approval of Separation of Mobility Global
summary: S&P Global Inc. (NYSE: SPGI) ("S&P Global") today announced that its Board of Directors (the "Board") has approved the previously announced separation of its Mobility division, and the creation of an independent, public company, Mobility Global Inc. ("Mobility Global").

headline: Jaguar Land Rover Schaumburg Earns Its First CarFax Top-Rated Dealer Award for 2025
